ddls:
CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the province */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the province in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission source */,
  "transmission_rate" REAL /* Percentage of cases attributed to this source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the transmission data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "local_transmission" (
  "local_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local transmission source */,
  "local_name" TEXT /* Name of the local transmission source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the local transmission source */,
  "transmission_rate" REAL /* Percentage of local cases attributed to this source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the transmission data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("local_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_workers" (
  "hw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare worker */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the healthcare worker */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the healthcare worker */,
  "isolation_date" TEXT /* Date when the healthcare worker was isolated */,
  "hospitalization_date" TEXT /* Date when the healthcare worker was hospitalized */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the healthcare worker recovered */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date when the healthcare worker died */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the healthcare worker */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the healthcare worker */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the healthcare worker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_workers_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds */,
  "covid_beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds for COVID-19 patients */,
  "admitted_patients" INTEGER /* Total number of admitted patients */,
  "stable_patients" INTEGER /* Number of stable patients */,
  "critical_patients" INTEGER /* Number of critical patients */,
  "ventilator_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients on ventilators */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds */,
  "icu_occupied_beds" INTEGER /* Number of occupied ICU beds */,
  "ventilators_available" INTEGER /* Number of available ventilators */,
  "ventilators_in_use" INTEGER /* Number of ventilators in use */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of staff vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarantine_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarantine facility */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the quarantine facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the facility */,
  "occupied" INTEGER /* Number of occupied spaces in the facility */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds in the facility */,
  "icu_occupied_beds" INTEGER /* Number of occupied ICU beds */,
  "ventilators_available" INTEGER /* Number of available ventilators */,
  "ventilators_in_use" INTEGER /* Number of ventilators in use */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of quarantined individuals vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarantine_facilities_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test entry */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the testing */,
  "number_of_tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted */,
  "results_achieved" INTEGER /* Number of test results achieved */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive test cases */,
  "positive_cases_percent" REAL /* Percentage of positive test cases */,
  "antigen_tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Number of antigen tests conducted */,
  "antibody_tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Number of antibody tests conducted */,
  "test_kit_type" TEXT /* Type of test kits used */,
  "test_kit_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the test kits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_data" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel entry */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the travel data */,
  "arrivals" INTEGER /* Number of arrivals */,
  "departures" INTEGER /* Number of departures */,
  "quarantined" INTEGER /* Number of people quarantined due to travel */,
  "travelers_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinated travelers */,
  "travelers_tested" INTEGER /* Number of travelers tested upon arrival */,
  "travelers_positive" INTEGER /* Number of travelers who tested positive */,
  "travelers_quarantined" INTEGER /* Number of travelers quarantined upon arrival */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_data_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)
